scenes.title: Chapter 13 - Scene 1: Alone at Dusk
scenes.narration: The few small patches of light that showed through the forest canopy were beginning to change from blue to purple, and Chaz began to feel uneasy about being left alone.

scenes.title: Chapter 13 - Scene 2: The Tinderbox
scenes.narration: Scraping the two bars together, Chaz produced an impressive spray of sparks. The flame grew, and he held a torch over it. It caught instantly.

scenes.title: Chapter 13 - Scene 3: Cooking by the Fire
scenes.narration: He sat on a stone upwind from the billowing smoke. He put the end of his sword into the fire and watched the meat start to cook.

scenes.title: Chapter 13 - Scene 4: The Troll Appears
scenes.narration: A sudden breeze flattened the plume of smoke, revealing a face staring back at him. It wasn't human, not even close. Chaz knew a troll when he saw one.

scenes.title: Chapter 13 - Scene 5: Speared
scenes.narration: With a speed Chaz hadn't thought it capable of, the troll hurled its spear at Chaz, piercing him just below his ribcage.

scenes.title: Chapter 13 - Scene 6: Butterbean Attacks
scenes.narration: A blur of grey fur leaped past him. The wolf tore into the troll, dragging it backward into the campfire.

scenes.title: Chapter 13 - Scene 7: Katherine Returns
scenes.narration: Katherine sat cross-legged on the ground, and rested Chaz's head in her lap. She took a long pull from the waterskin. "Aaaahhh... That's the stuff."
